description: First base64 character of signature.sig.signatures[1].signature_b64 (ML-DSA-65 sig) deterministically flipped. Surfaces at Check 1 verifyMlDsa65Leg crypto verify (step 9); Ed25519 leg runs at step 8 + passes.

modifications.mutation: signatures[1].signature_b64 first base64 character flipped (alphabet pairwise rotation).
modifications.rationale: ML-DSA-65 signature bytes change → cryptographic verification fails. The base64 string length + shape are unchanged so length-check + base64-decode both still succeed; only mldsa65.Verify fails.

expected_failures: check 1 (manifest signature): ML-DSA-65 verification fails against pinned issuer-dev-v2-ml-dsa-65 key. algorithm_verdicts[0]={ed25519, pass}; algorithm_verdicts[1]={ml-dsa-65, fail} per spec §18.10 (Ed25519 leg runs first + passes).
